acceptance: Plan submission and replacement create no approval Kanban card.
Gateway dispatch cannot start approval work or create a worktree before ledger approval.
Plugin approval fails closed when HERMES_KANBAN_TASK is present and leaves ledger, Kanban, and workspace unchanged.
Wrong and stale approval digests still fail closed.
Attended non-worker approval records the current plan and constraint tuple, creates one owned worktree, and creates one idempotent post-gate graph.
Post-gate cards depend on the current plan card and cannot exist before ledger approval.
Status and recommendations expose one exact approval action without a host approval card.
Historical approval CardReference values remain readable and inert.
excluded: No artifact-immutability implementation from Increment B.
No live controller, profile, board, cron, gateway, worktree, GitHub-ready, installation, push, release, or deployment mutation.
No migration or deletion of historical approval-card records.
No daemon, external approval service, synthetic assignee, hidden profile, or generated approval token.
verification: pytest -q tests/test_kanban.py tests/test_tools.py tests/test_worker_contract.py tests/test_recommendations.py tests/test_execution.py tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_cli.py
